description: 9-axis MEMS IMU (gyro + accel + AK09916 magnetometer), I2C/SPI

fields.description: X offset user bits [15:8]

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_RNW
fields.description: 1 - Transfer is a read.

fields.description: Physical address of I^2 C slave 0.

fields.name: XG_ST_DATA
fields.description: X gyro self-test data

fields.description: Delays shadowing of external sensor data until all data is received.

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved.

fields.name: I2C_SLV4_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 4 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV3_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 3 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV2_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 2 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 1 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_DELAY_EN
fields.description: When enabled, slave 0 will only be accessed 1/(1+I2C_SLC4_DLY) samples as determined by I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: ZG_ST_DATA
fields.description: Z gyro self-test data

I2C Master.name: XG_OFFS_USRL
I2C Master.description: X gyro offset user low byte (User Bank 2)

fields.name: X_OFFS_USER
fields.description: X offset user bits [7:0]

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_REG
fields.description: I^2 C slave 0 register address from where to begin data transfer.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable reading data from this slave at the sample rate and storing data at the first available EXT_SENS_DATA register, which is always EXT_SENS_DATA_00 for I^2 C slave 0. 0 - Function is disabled for this slave.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_BYTE_SW
fields.description: 1 - Swap bytes when reading both the low and high byte of a word. Note there is nothing to swap after reading the first byte if I2C_SLV0_REG[0] = 1, or if the last byte read has a register address lsb = 0. For example, if I2C_SLV0_REG = 0x1, and I2C_SLV0_LENG = 0x4: 1) The first byte read from address 0x1 will be stored at EXT_SENS_DATA_00, 2) the second and third bytes will be read and swapped, so the data read from address 0x2 will be stored at EXT_SENS_DATA_02, and the data read from address 0x3 will be stored at EXT_SENS_DATA_01, 3) The last byte read from address 0x4 will be stored at EXT_SENS_DATA_03. 0 - No swapping occurs; bytes are written in order read.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_REG_DIS
fields.description: When set, the transaction does not write a register value, it will only read data, or write data.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_GRP
fields.description: External sensor data typically comes in as groups of two bytes. This bit is used to determine if the groups are from the slave's register address 0 and 1, 2 and 3, etc.., or if the groups are address 1 and 2, 3 and 4, etc. 0 indicates slave register addresses 0 and 1 are grouped together (odd numbered register ends the group). 1 indicates slave register addresses 1 and 2 are grouped together (even numbered register ends the group). This allows byte swapping of registers that are grouped starting at any address.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_LENG
fields.description: Number of bytes to be read from I^2 C slave 0.

fields.name: SLV1_REG
fields.description: I2C slave 1 register address

I2C Master.name: ZG_OFFS_USRL
I2C Master.description: Z gyro offset user low byte (User Bank 2)

fields.name: Z_OFFS_USER
fields.description: Z offset user bits [7:0]

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable reading data from this slave at the sample rate and storing data at the first available EXT_SENS_DATA register as determined by I2C_SLV0_EN and I2C_SLV0_LENG. 0 - Function is disabled for this slave.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_BYTE_SW
fields.description: 1 - Swap bytes when reading both the low and high byte of a word.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_REG_DIS
fields.description: When set, the transaction does not write a register value, it will only read data, or write data.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_GRP
fields.description: External sensor data typically comes in as groups of two bytes. This bit is used to determine if the groups are from the slave's register address 0 and 1, 2 and 3, etc.., or if the groups are address 1 and 2, 3 and 4, etc.

enum_values.1: Enable reading data from this slave
enum_values.0: Function is disabled for this slave

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEH
fields.description: High byte of delay time between FSYNC and gyro ODR

fields.name: TBC_PLL
fields.description: Timebase correction PLL value

Timing/Delay.name: DELAY_TIMEL
Timing/Delay.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEL
fields.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event. Delay time in µs = (DELAY_TIMEH * 256 + DELAY_TIMEL) * 0.9645

FIFO.name: FIFO_EN_1
FIFO.description: FIFO enable register for slave sensors

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: SLV_3_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_3 to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_2_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_2 to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_1_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_1 to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_0_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_0 to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: ACCEL_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write ACCEL_XOUT_H, ACCEL_XOUT_L, ACCEL_YOUT_H, ACCEL_YOUT_L, ACCEL_ZOUT_H, and ACCEL_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Z_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_ZOUT_H and GYRO_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Y_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_YOUT_H and GYRO_YOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_X_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_XOUT_H and GYRO_XOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: TEMP_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write TEMP_OUT_H and TEMP_OUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_RESET
fields.description: S/W FIFO reset. Assert and hold to set FIFO size to 0. Assert and de-assert to reset FIFO.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_MODE
fields.description: 0 - Stream. 1 - Snapshot. When set to '1', when the FIFO is full, additional writes will not be written to FIFO. When set to '0', when the FIFO is full, additional writes will be written to the FIFO, replacing the oldest data.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_CNT
fields.description: High Bits, count indicates the number of written bytes in the FIFO. Reading this byte latches the data for both FIFO_COUNTH, and FIFO_COUNTL.

fields.name: FIFO_CNT
fields.description: Low bits, count indicates the number of written bytes in the FIFO.

fields.name: FIFO_R_W
fields.description: Reading from or writing to this register actually reads/writes the FIFO.

fields.name: WOF_STATUS
fields.description: Wake on FSYNC interrupt status. Cleared on read.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RAW_DATA_RDY
fields.description: Data from sensors is copied to FIFO or SRAM. Set when sequence controller kicks off on a sensor data load. Only bit 0 is relevant in a single FIFO configuration. Cleared on read.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FIFO_CFG
fields.description: This bit should be set to 1 if interrupt status for each sensor is required.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: USER_BANK
fields.description: Use the following values in this bit-field to select a USER BANK. 0: Select USER BANK 0. 1: Select USER BANK 1. 2: Select USER BANK 2. 3: Select USER BANK 3.

fields.name: RESERVED_3_0
fields.description: Reserved

fields.description: Sensor data read from external I2C devices via the I2C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0-4)_CTRL registers.

fields.name: DELAY_TIME_EN
fields.description: Enables delay time measurement between FSYNC event and first ODR event

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: WOF_DEGLITCH_EN
fields.description: Enable digital deglitching of FSYNC input for Wake on FSYNC

fields.name: WOF_EDGE_INT
fields.description: FSYNC is level or edge interrupt for Wake on FSYNC

fields.name: EXT_SYNC_SET
fields.description: FSYNC bit location selection

External Slave Data.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_23
External Slave Data.description: Sensor data read from external I2C devices via the I2C master interface

fields.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_23
fields.description: Sensor data read from external I2C devices via the I2C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0-4)_CTRL registers.

fields.name: DEVICE_RESET
fields.description: 1 - Reset the internal registers and restores the default settings. Write a 1 to set the reset, the bit will auto clear.

fields.name: SLEEP
fields.description: When set, the chip is set to sleep mode (in sleep mode all analog is powered off). Clearing the bit wakes the chip from sleep mode.

fields.name: LP_EN
fields.description: The LP_EN only affects the digital circuitry, it helps to reduce the digital current when sensors are in LP mode.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: TEMP_DIS
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit disables the temperature sensor.

fields.name: CLKSEL
fields.description: Clock source selection

enum_values.1: Auto selects the best available clock source
enum_values.7: Stops the clock and keeps timing generator in reset

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: DISABLE_ACCEL
fields.description: Accelerometer disable control. 111 - Accelerometer (all axes) disabled. 000 - Accelerometer (all axes) on.

fields.name: DISABLE_GYRO
fields.description: Gyroscope disable control. 111 - Gyroscope (all axes) disabled. 000 - Gyroscope (all axes) on.

fields.name: TEMP_DLPFCFG
fields.description: Low pass filter configuration for temperature sensor

fields.name: RSVD_7_3
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: RSVD
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: REG_LP_DMP_EN
fields.description: Enable DMP in Low Power Accelerometer mode

fields.name: INT1_ACTL
fields.description: 1 - The logic level for INT1 pin is active low. 0 - The logic level for INT1 pin is active high.

fields.name: INT1_OPEN
fields.description: 1 - INT1 pin is configured as open drain. 0 - INT1 pin is configured as push-pull.

fields.name: INT1_LATCH__EN
fields.description: 1 - INT1 pin level held until interrupt status is cleared. 0 - INT1 pin indicates interrupt pulse is width 50 µs.

fields.name: INT_ANYRD_2CLEAR
fields.description: 1 - Interrupt status in INT_STATUS is cleared if any read operation is performed. 0 - Interrupt status cleared only by reading INT_STATUS register.

fields.name: ACTL_FSYNC
fields.description: 1 - The logic level for the FSYNC pin as an interrupt is active low. 0 - active high.

fields.name: FSYNC_INT_MODE_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enables the FSYNC pin to be used as an interrupt. 0 - Disables FSYNC pin from causing an interrupt.

fields.name: BYPASS_EN
fields.description: When asserted, the I2C_MASTER interface pins will go into bypass mode when the I^2C master interface is disabled.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved
